zh.Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aq: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯
zh.Rosiers-d'Égletons, Ussel, Corrèze, Nouv: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯
zh.Le Chambon-Feugerolles, Loire, Auvergne-: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易勒 哈波-費尤格洛勒斯
zh.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON是Hughes III de CHAMBON和Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX的女兒，於1293年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易勒 哈波-費尤格洛勒斯。她於1326年與Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1343年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯享年50歲。

zh-hans.Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aq: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON是Hughes III de CHAMBON和Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX的女儿，于1293年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易勒 哈波-費尤格洛勒斯。她于1326年与Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1343年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CHAMBON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places called Chambon, named with a derivative of Gaulish cambo ‘(river) bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON was born in 1293, in Le Chambon-Feugerolles, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France as the daughter of Hughes III de CHAMBON and Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX. She married Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT in 1326. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1343, in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON est née en 1293, à Le Chambon-Feugerolles, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, fille de Hughes III de CHAMBON et Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX. Elle a épousé Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT en 1326. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1343, à Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON wurde 1293 in Le Chambon-Feugerolles, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich, als Tochter von Hughes III de CHAMBON und Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX geboren. Sie hat 1326 Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1343 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON è nata il nel 1293 nel Le Chambon-Feugerolles, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia come figlia di Hughes III de CHAMBON e Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX. Lei sposato Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT nel 1326. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1343, nel Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aq: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズロシエルス-ド'eグレトンス

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBONは1293年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスロイアール チャンボン-フエウジャーオレスでHughes III de CHAMBONとGuillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUXの娘として生まれた。1326年にGuillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1343年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズロシエルス-ド'eグレトンスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON(은)는 1293년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 로이르 일 챔보-프우그로레스에서 Hughes III de CHAMBON(와)과 Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1326년 Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1343년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 로시어스-드'e글레토스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON nasceu em 1293, em Le Chambon-Feugerolles, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França filha de Hughes III de CHAMBON e Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX. Ela casou-se com Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT em 1326. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1343, em Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON родилась в 1293 г. в местности л чамбон-феугироллесь, лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. Её родителей звали Hughes III de CHAMBON и Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT в 1326 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1343 г. в местности росиирс-д'eглетонс, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Marie de CHAMBON nació en 1293, en Le Chambon-Feugerolles, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia como hija de Hughes III de CHAMBON y Guillemette TINIÈRES de MONTROUX. Se casó con Guillaume II ROGIER de BEAUFORT en 1326. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1343, en Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
